beat: AI-generated sites can look ready, but still miss launch-readiness details.
ShipReady checks what crawlers and preview bots can see.
This page needs attention before launch.
ShipReady separates safe crawl files from changes that need review.
Two safe files are ready: robots.ts and sitemap.ts.
The GUI does not write files. It gives a guarded command.
No overwrites. No content edits. No Git commits. No deploys.
Deploy when ready, then re-check the live site.
